colors.name: hanji
colors.role: ground — aged mulberry paper, the sheet every minhwa is painted on; every pigment is judged against it

colors.name: hanji-deep
colors.role: aged-paper fold — caption scrolls, panel mounts, footer ground, the obangsaek swatch rail (13.1:1 on heuk)

colors.name: heuk
colors.role: 흑 · 먹 — ink-black line work, all functional text, the final outline a minhwa painter draws last (13.6:1 on hanji, AAA)

colors.name: ink-soft
colors.role: ink thinned with water — secondary text, symbol glosses, English captions (6.5:1 on hanji, AA)

colors.name: jeok
colors.role: 적 · 석간주 — THE accent: focus ring, ::selection, links, the seal-stamp vermillion, the gallery's signature red (4.7:1 on hanji, AA for body/large)

colors.name: cheong
colors.role: 청 · 청록 — east/spring/wood; the blue-green of pine needles and the tiger's sky; allowed as functional text on hanji (5.0:1, AA)

colors.name: hwang
colors.role: 황 · 석황 — center/soil/emperor; the gold of longevity and prosperity; 2.6:1 on hanji so DISPLAY/DECORATIVE ONLY (8.4:1 on heuk, where it sits as a dot)

colors.name: baek
colors.role: 백 · 호분 — west/autumn/metal; the powdered-shell white of bitneoki breath lines and card grounds; never text on hanji (it is the paper itself)

colors.name: jeongjo
colors.role: banked jeok — wherever red must function as fine text on hanji it darkens to this deep cinnabar (7.0:1, AAA) — eyebrows, small captions over paint

colors.name: seal-red
colors.role: the vermillion of a real 인장 stamp — slightly deeper than jeok so a stamped seal reads as ink-on-paper, not a flat fill (4.9:1 as large glyph on hanji)

fonts.role: Korean display — the wordmark 민화, motif titles, seal captions; a naive hand-brushed village-painter face, the folk/charming register that makes a minhwa heading smile instead of shout
every Korean body glyph — symbol-meaning narration, obangsaek notes, colophon; a warm serif so captions read like a museum label written by someone who loves the painting
English voice — the subtitle, English captions, folio numerals; optical-sized serif with a baked-in warmth, the way an English gallery card is set

texture: Aged hanji in three static registers (none animated — the paper is a sheet, not a screen). (1) Fibers: one fixed full-viewport SVG feTurbulence (fractalNoise, baseFrequency 0.7, 2 octaves, seed 11, stitchTiles) mapped by feColorMatrix to heuk at ~6.5% alpha, mix-blend-mode multiply, opacity 0.55 — warm aged fibers, more yellowed than the fresh paper of ppang. (2) Foxing: a faint radial warm-brown vignette, transparent → rgba(122,36,28,0.04) at the edges, the patina of an old scroll. (3) Laid lines: repeating-linear-gradient, 1.5px of rgba(26,20,16,0.016) every 7px. Over each minhwa panel: a 1px hanji hairline mount with 0 18px 40px rgba(26,20,16,0.14) soft shadow and clamp(8px,1.2vw,14px) padding — a painting glued to the page.

motion.name: ease-stamp
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) — a stamp landing with a tiny overshoot; the folk-painting's cheerful hand

motion.name: ease-settle
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) — every reveal's long tail, the page settling after the pop

motion.name: ease-press
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.2, 1) — the seal descending: even, deliberate, like a real 도장 pressed flat

motion.name: motif-stamp
motion.value: spring-press — opacity 0→1, scale 0.82→1 with ease-stamp, +translateY(18px), 760ms; one spring per motif, fired at scroll-into-view. minhwa is cheerful, not austere

motion.name: seal-press
motion.value: on activation: the seal descends translateY(-90% → 0) + scale(1.25 → 1) + opacity 0→1 over 480ms ease-press, lands, then a 1px ink rim expands 360ms — the certified mark

motion.name: narration-glyph
motion.value: char-split reveal — 850ms ease-settle, 42ms/glyph stagger for the symbol-meaning line; like a curator reading the painting aloud

motion.name: obangsaek-tint
motion.value: instant pigment swap — selecting an obangsaek color sets --minhwa-accent-live on the root; pigment does not ease, only the focus ring's transform does

motion.name: longevity-scrub
motion.value: scroll-scrubbed pinned section — the ten 장생 symbols advance one position per 0.1 of page progress while pinned; the active symbol scales 1.0→1.08 and its caption crossfades

motion.name: hero-float
motion.value: the hero's sun and moon discs drift on mutually-prime cycles (sun 7.1s, moon 6.3s); the pine sways ±0.8° / 8.4s — the picture breathes, it never loops

motion.name: reveal
motion.value: 820ms ease-settle, translateY(18px) → 0, 80ms batch stagger — section heads, notes, footer
